summary: Iteration 132: Tested Auto Vehicle Weight Messaging feature - white theme, 2 cameras, auto-notify on weight completion. All backend APIs (8/8) and frontend features (12/12) working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test vehicle weight entry (RST #5, TEST_VW_132) during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Auto Vehicle Weight Messaging features tested and working: 1) White theme applied to VehicleWeight component - all cards have white backgrounds with proper text contrast 2) Two cameras (Front View + Side View) visible side by side below weighbridge display 3) Auto-notify triggers on second weight save - shows toast 'Auto Msg: WA: X sent, TG: X sent' 4) Settings > Messaging tab has Auto VW Messaging card with ON/OFF toggle 5) Toggle persists state via API 6) Scale auto-connects on page load, shows STABLE-LOCKED badge 7) COM3 Connected badge always visible 8) RST editable via Edit button 9) Delete buttons work for pending and completed entries

backend_api_post_auto_notify.details: POST /api/vehicle-weight/auto-notify accepts entry_id, front_image, side_image and returns success with WA/TG send counts

settings_auto_vw_messaging_card.details: Auto Vehicle Weight Messaging card visible under Settings > Messaging tab with Scale icon

settings_auto_vw_toggle.details: ON/OFF toggle works - clicking changes state from OFF to ON and vice versa

vehicle_weight_white_theme.details: White theme applied - entry form card, weighbridge display, pending list, completed table all have white backgrounds with readable text

vehicle_weight_two_cameras.details: Two camera feeds visible side by side - Front View and Side View with Start/Stop buttons

vehicle_weight_scale_auto_connect.details: Scale auto-connects on page load (1.5s delay), shows STABLE-LOCKED badge when weight stabilizes

vehicle_weight_first_weight_entry.details: First weight entry creation works - entry appears in Pending Vehicle List

vehicle_weight_second_weight_capture.details: Second weight inline capture works - clicking 2nd Wt loads entry, shows First Wt (Gross) and Second Wt (Tare) inputs

vehicle_weight_auto_notify_trigger.details: Auto-notify triggers on second weight save - toast shows 'Auto Msg: WA: 0 sent, TG: 0 sent' (0 because no WA/TG configured)

mocked_apis.camera_capture: Camera capture returns null/empty in test environment (no webcam in cloud)
mocked_apis.whatsapp_telegram_send: WhatsApp/Telegram actual send depends on user's API keys being configured - tested endpoint returns success with 0 sent counts
